FlagsBanner Magnets 4 Pack HomeCustom FlagsRectangle Flags Rectangle Flags - Order Custom Rectangle Flags Online! Order Custom Indoor and Outdoor Rectangle Flags Rectangle flags are an ideal solution for showcasing large amounts of information, offering more surface area than feather or teardrop flags. Thanks to their larger size, custom rectangle flags provide maximum visibility, making them perfect for indoor and outdoor signage. Known for their durability and portability, these versatile rectangle advertising flags can withstand various environments while maintaining their professional appearance. Whether you're using rectangle flags for backdrops, yard displays, or other promotional purposes, they deliver an impactful way to highlight your message. With a wide variety of flag templates available, you can easily create personalized rectangle flags tailored to your needs, ensuring your design stands out and captures attention in any setting. Please note the actual finished flag size is smaller. The sizes listed include the printed flag and the base. Click on a rectangle flag size below for pricing and to get started on your order: 10 Foot Rectangle Flag View Product 14.5 Foot Rectangle Flag View Product 7 Foot Rectangle Flag View Product More About Rectangle Flags Rectangle flags also referred to as rectangle flag banners are eye-catching flag displays in the shape of a rectangle. They are the perfect advertising solution for anyone looking for a stylistic yet informative way to display their message for their business, school, or event! These rectangle flags are easily assembled with a flag pole and display base that allows them to be displayed in either an indoor or outdoor setting. The main advantage of choosing a rectangle flag over other advertising banner flag options such as a feather flag or teardrop flag is that you get a much larger printing surface. This allows you to display more text, logos, and color to help grab your audience's attention. Download Rectangle Flag Templates to Create Your Design Custom Flag Printing has never been easier! If you would like to design your own custom rectangle flags, you can download the templates below and then upload your files. We will check the artwork and send you a proof to verify that everything looks ok before we send the order into production. Rectangle Flag Templates Flag Size Single Sided Template Double Sided Template 7 Foot Rectangle Flag 29"W x 60.75"H 29"W x 60.75"H 10 Foot Rectangle Flag 29"W x 92.25"H 29"W x 92.25"H 14.5 Foot Rectangle Flag 29.5"W x 148.75"H 29.5"W x 148.75"H All rectangle flags are printed using a direct dye-sublimation printing process. This means that the ink goes through the fabric rather than sitting on top of it. This creates an eye-popping display. The flag poles are constructed of a strong but flexible Carbon Composite material that is superior to other poles that have an aluminum base. Frequently Asked Questions Return to Top What are rectangle flags (rectangle flag banners)? Rectangle flags are tall, rectangular advertising flags displayed with a pole-and-base system for indoor or outdoor promotions. Why choose a rectangle flag instead of a feather or teardrop flag? Rectangle flags provide more printable surface area, making them better for designs with more text, logos, and details. What sizes do rectangle flags come in, and what are the printed dimensions? Rectangle flags come in 7 ft (29" W × 60.75" H), 10 ft (29" W × 92.25" H), and 14.5 ft (29.5" W × 148.75" H) options. Do the listed sizes include the base? Yes—the listed display sizes include the printed flag plus the base, so the finished flag portion is smaller than the overall display size. Are rectangle flags single-sided or double-sided? Rectangle flags are available in single-sided (single-reverse) or double-sided printing using the matching templates for each option. How are rectangle flags printed? All rectangle flags are printed using direct dye sublimation, so the ink goes through the fabric for a vibrant, eye-catching display. Will I receive a proof before production? Yes—we check your artwork and send a proof for approval before your order goes into production. What production times do you offer, and when does turnaround start? Production options range from 2–5 business days, and turnaround starts after file upload is complete (or after proof/prepress approval if required). Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST are processed the next business day, and delivery time includes production plus shipping. Why Choose Banners.com? Customer Service Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers. Fast Turnaround Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your order on your schedule. Quality Products Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology.
